setup.note: Google Calendar remote MCP server. Developer Preview. Enable Google Calendar API and Google Calendar MCP API in a Google Cloud project, configure the OAuth consent screen, add scopes https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.calendarlist.readonly, https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.events.freebusy, and https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.events.readonly, then create a Google OAuth client and register FlexiGPT's OAuth redirect URL exactly. Use a fixed FlexiGPT loopback port before registration if needed. Reference: https://developers.google.com/workspace/calendar/api/guides/configure-mcp-server

inputs.label: Google OAuth Client
inputs.description: OAuth client ID and client secret from Google Auth Platform.
inputs.note: Register the FlexiGPT OAuth redirect URL exactly in Google Auth Platform.
